title: Construction Design Manager (CBD)
description:
• Project Support – Assist project teams across all stages, including design development, technical compliance, and contract matters, ensuring alignment with cost, schedule, and regulatory requirements.
  • Design & Construction – Collaborate on conceptual and detailed designs, including value engineering proposals during Tender/ECI stages. Coordinate with project teams to ensure timely deliverables and goal-oriented project outcomes.
  • Regulatory Compliance & Quality Assurance – Ensure adherence to relevant codes, standards, and statutory requirements, maintaining high-quality project delivery.
  • Contract Administration – Support Project Managers in managing contracts, tracking milestones, and ensuring timely completion of deliverables.
  • Project Coordination – Manage and coordinate technical and design aspects with consultants, oversee preparation and review of construction documents, and conduct site walks to verify compliance with project specifications.
  • Client & Stakeholder Engagement – Lead meetings and presentations, update clients on progress, and act as the primary communication link between project teams, clients, contractors, and consultants.
  • Team Leadership – Lead project teams of varying sizes, guide junior staff, ensure quality of work, foster effective communication, and leverage team strengths and office resources.
  • Technical Problem-Solving – Anticipate and resolve complex design and technical challenges during both documentation and construction phases.
  • Collaboration & Innovation – Work closely with clients, consultants, contractors, fabricators, regulatory agencies, and vendors to meet project objectives and provide innovative, practical design solutions.

Requirements

  • Master’s degree in Architecture from a recognised and accredited institution.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. All applications will be handled confidentially. By submitting your application, you agree to the collection, use, retention, and disclosure of your personal information to prospective employers.

Whether you're looking for permanent roles or short-term assignments, our consultants take the time to understand your experience, preferences, and goals to match you with suitable roles.

With over 1,000 successful placements and a strong track record of candidate satisfaction, Wecruit is here to support your career journey.


Let us help you take the next step—reach out to explore current opportunities or to speak with our team.
